dct_title_s: California Department of Fish and Wildlife GIS Maps & Data
dct_description_sm: This collection of data is produced by the California Department of Fish and Wildlife for planning, conservation, and analysis activities throughout the state of California. This collection includes over 200 data layers covering a variety of environmental topics including: coastlines, bathymetry, trawl blocks, monthly and annual precipitation levels, hydrography, cultural points of interest, habitat surveys and environmental management activities.
System requirements: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) software that reads ESRI shapefile format.
dct_publisher_sm: California Dept. of Fish and Wildlife.
dct_rights_sm: This item is in the public domain.  There are no restrictions on use.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: This work is in the Public Domain, meaning that it is not subject to copyright.
